title: Natural language processing
abstract_raw: Natural language processing(NLP) is the processing ofnatural languageinformation by acomputer. NLP is a subfield ofcomputer scienceand is closely associated withartificial intelligence. NLP is also related toinformation retrieval,knowledge representation,computational linguistics, andlinguisticsmore broadly.[1] Major processing tasks in an NLP system include:speech recognition,text classification,natural language understanding, andnatural language generation.
